mnemonics: XML: Xylophones Make Ladders (eXtract, Parse, Load Data)
keyPoints: Use the xml.etree.ElementTree module to parse XML data
Navigate the XML tree structure using element tags and attributes
Convert parsed XML data into Python data structures like lists or dictionaries for analysis
commonMistakes: Forgetting to handle namespaces in XML documents
Not accounting for potential missing elements or attributes when parsing
Attempting to parse extremely large XML files entirely into memory instead of using iterative parsing
